creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #7)
Thanks for picking this up.

I did get a prompt response from Erik. My thanks for that. I was the one who did not follow up promptly.

Erik says that there will not be a new release until he completes the incorporation of Opus support and is uncertain when that will happen. He reported that fuzz testing has brought up a problem and there are several issues in the github queue that must be addressed prior to a new release. He has no timetable.

So an interim update to incorporate the security fixes seems appropriate.
